summary_de: Produktive Web-UI unter :3001 nutzt stdlib-Python (ThreadingHTTPServer) statt Vite preview; SPA-Fallback; /api/* auf :3001 -> 404 mit Hinweis auf :8000.
summary_en: Production web UI on :3001 uses stdlib Python (ThreadingHTTPServer) instead of Vite preview; SPA fallback; /api/* on :3001 returns 404 pointing to :8000.
journalctl_note: Full unit logs require adm group or sudo: sudo journalctl -u setuphelfer.service -n 300 --no-pager
runtime_deploy_on_this_host: not executed in agent session (operator: sudo cp scripts + dist, systemctl restart setuphelfer.service)
